invariants.name: URL Registration → Field Tracking Flow
invariants.description: url_registry is the root entity. field_state tracks per-field state for each URL.
invariants.evidence: url_registry (domain, path) → field_state (url_id FK, field_name). UNIQUE(url_id, field_name) prevents duplicate field tracking per URL. UNIQUE(domain, path) prevents duplicate URL registration.

invariants.name: Check Cycle Audit Trail
invariants.description: Every check cycle produces an append-only check_log entry recording old/new values and timing.
invariants.evidence: check_log captures: url_id, field_name, checked_at, old_value, new_value, changed (bool), fetch_duration_ms, parse_duration_ms. Append-only enforcement ensures complete audit trail. idx_check_log_changed partial index optimizes change queries.

invariants.name: Error Tracking with Resolution
invariants.description: Errors are logged and can be marked resolved but never deleted.
invariants.evidence: error_log captures: url_id, field_name, error_type, error_message, occurred_at. resolved_at starts NULL, updated when resolved. DELETE prohibited by trigger. idx_error_log_unresolved partial index optimizes unresolved error queries.

invariants.name: Rate Limiting State Management
invariants.description: rate_state tracks per-domain request counts within time windows.
invariants.evidence: rate_state: domain + window_start (unique), request_count vs max_requests. Enables proxy router to enforce rate limits before dispatching fetches. Window boundaries allow sliding window or fixed window patterns.

invariants.name: Index Coverage for Worker Query Patterns
invariants.description: All expected worker query patterns are covered by indexes.
invariants.evidence: 20 indexes total. Key patterns covered: active URLs (idx_url_registry_active partial), field status queries (idx_field_state_status), promotion filtering (idx_field_state_promotion), check history by URL+field (idx_check_log_url_field), changed-only queries (idx_check_log_changed partial), unresolved errors (idx_error_log_unresolved partial), rate windows by domain (idx_rate_state_domain + idx_rate_state_window).
